findings.description: The first XML code example (精査クラス) in the knowledge file adds a `</list>` closing tag that does not appear in the source, and removes the `<!-- 中略 -->` comment that is present in the source. The source ends the block with `<!-- 中略 -->` then `</property>` without a `</list>` tag.
findings.source_evidence: Source ends the first XML block with: `    <!-- 中略 -->\n</property>` — no `</list>` closing tag is present in the source.
